subcodes.title: Words spoken at Unitarian church in Dublin, 1912-08-11
subcodes.first_line: That the world of nature is imperfect and needs education is to the wise beyond question. Consider, man uneducated is in utmost barbarism
subcodes.first_line_orig: در نزد عموم عقلا مسلم است که عالم طبیعت ناقص است و محتاج تربیت ملاحظه میکنید
subcodes.subjects: @second birth, @education of children; moral education, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @Manifestation of God as divine physician, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @need for an educator
